_comment: Official Mixpanel MCP server (hosted, OAuth). READ+WRITE server with NO read-only flag — read-only is enforced ONLY by the connected user's project role (use a Consumer role; see SETUP.md). The autonomous runner skips permission prompts, so the role is the only guardrail. An org admin must enable MCP first. US endpoint shown; EU: https://mcp-eu.mixpanel.com/mcp. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
